channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pakistan's military intensifies counter-terrorism operations in Balochistan under Operation Shaban
item.description: Pakistan's security forces have intensified counter-terrorism operations in Balochistan under Operation Shaban, eliminating 95 terrorists since July 5. The latest action resulted in 16 more casualties...

item.title: Ananse graduates drive Africa's $31bn fashion economy
item.description: The article highlights how emerging designers from Ananse Centre for Design are transforming Africa's $31bn fashion industry. Founded by Samuel Mensah, the program trains creatives in technical skills...

item.title: Tanzania's Football Growth Attracts South African Talent and Investment
item.description: The Tanzania Premier League is undergoing a significant transformation as high-profile South African coaches and players increasingly relocate to East Africa. This shift highlights Tanzania's emerging...

item.title: West Bengal CM addresses controversy over Indrajit Mondal's death
item.description: The article discusses West Bengal Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari's statement clarifying that Indrajit Mondal's death was a murder, not a lynching. This comes amid heightened political tension followi...

item.title: SK Hynix's Market Performance Following Initial Trading
item.description: The article analyzes SK Hynix's stock performance on its first day of trading following a significant merger with a major semiconductor company. Key points include the initial market reaction, analyst...

item.title: Tragic Boat Accident Claims Lives of 15 Indian Tourists Near Phú Quốc Island
item.description: Fifteen Indian tourists lost their lives in a tragic boat accident off the coast of Phú Quốc Island in Vietnam. The incident occurred on Saturday when a speedboat carrying 32 Indian tourists, three cr...

item.title: Reflections on Vacation Souvenirs and Cultural Artifacts
item.description: The article explores the cultural significance of vacation souvenirs through the lens of Edith Pritchett's cartoon, critiquing consumerism and the commodification of travel experiences. It argues that...

item.title: Alberta's Economic Rise and Separatist Sentiments at the Calgary Stampede 2026
item.description: The Calgary Stampede 2026 has become a platform for Alberta to showcase its economic resurgence while grappling with separatist movements. Premier Danielle Smith emphasized Alberta's 'moment' as the p...

item.title: Chianda Boys High School Closes After Second Dormitory Fire Displaces Students
item.description: Chianda Boys High School in Siaya County has been closed indefinitely after a second dormitory fire destroyed the Senior Chief Nathan Ojungo House, displacing 113 Form Three students. The blaze occurr...

item.title: Davina McCall and Michael Douglas attend Wimbledon day 13 with celebrity guests
item.description: On day 13 of Wimbledon, TV presenter Davina McCall, 58, and her husband Michael Douglas, 52, made a stylish entrance at the All England Lawn Tennis and Croquet Club. The couple, married in December 20...

item.title: Free State police seize R3.6 million in illicit cigarettes during operation, three arrested
item.description: Police in the Free State have conducted an intelligence-driven operation in Boshof, resulting in the seizure of illicit cigarettes worth an estimated R3.6 million and the arrest of three men. The oper...

item.title: Gachagua to Seek Uhuru's Guidance Ahead of 2027 Election
item.description: Former Deputy President Rigathi Gachagua has confirmed he will seek advice from former President Uhuru Kenyatta ahead of the 2027 general election. During a meeting with local leaders in Nyandarua Cou...

item.title: Marc Marquez Claims German MotoGP Pole Position with Lap Record
item.description: Marc Marquez secured pole position for the German MotoGP Grand Prix after breaking the lap record at the Sachsenring circuit. The Spanish rider achieved a time of 1:19.041 on his Ducati, marking his t...

item.title: DJ Chicken charged with threatening to kill Seyi Tinubu
item.description: A social media influencer, Abiodun Ademola (known as DJ Chicken), appeared in court over allegations of threatening to kill Seyi Tinubu. The charges include attempting to intimidate a public figure th...

item.title: Robbie Williams and CMAT Shine at Bilbao BBK Live 2026
item.description: The second day of Bilbao BBK Live 2026 showcased standout performances from Robbie Williams and CMAT, highlighting their charisma and musical prowess. Robbie Williams delivered a 90-minute set filled ...

item.title: Daniel Tupou scores 300th-game hat-trick as Roosters dominate Eels
item.description: In a thrilling NRL clash, the Sydney Roosters celebrated Daniel Tupou's milestone 300th NRL game with a decisive 28-12 victory over the Parramatta Eels. The legendary winger, playing his 300th match, ...

item.title: Dru Brown shines as Winnipeg Blue Bombers secure second consecutive victory
item.description: In a thrilling matchup at Princess Auto Stadium, the Winnipeg Blue Bombers claimed their second straight win with a 30-21 victory over the Toronto Argonauts. Quarterback Dru Brown, making his first st...

item.title: Supreme Court's Decision Expands Presidential Power and Deregulation Risks
item.description: The Supreme Court's ruling in Trump v. Slaughter has significantly expanded presidential authority by allowing the president to fire independent agency officials for any reason, overturning decades-ol...

item.title: Msalala Council Faces Special Audit Over Financial Mismanagement and Audit Interference
item.description: Msalala District Council in Shinyanga Region is under intense scrutiny after receiving its first qualified audit opinion since establishment, prompting the regional commissioner to order a special aud...

item.title: Flash Flood Incident in Jose Abad Santos, Davao Occidental Leaves 9 Missing
item.description: A flash flood struck the barangay of Jose Abad Santos in Davao Occidental, leaving at least nine individuals missing. The incident occurred on July 11, 2026, during heavy rainfall that overwhelmed loc...
